overall.description: Nighttime driving in GTA V through a rain-soaked urban street lined with palm trees. The vehicle approaches a railroad crossing where a pedestrian suddenly crosses, forcing a stop, before turning right and continuing alongside a multi-story parking garage.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road approaching railroad crossing

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through the rain-soaked street toward a railroad crossing with warning signals

entered.detail: railroad crossing with X-shaped crossbuck signs, flashing red lights, and gate mechanism
row of tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
row of tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
tall street lamps illuminating the wet road surface
low-rise commercial structures visible in the distance beyond the crossing

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives steadily through a rain-soaked urban street at night, approaching a railroad crossing marked by X-shaped warning signs. Palm trees line both sides of the multi-lane road, and street lights illuminate the wet asphalt reflecting the artificial glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: railroad crossing approach with pedestrian interaction

events.description: pedestrian suddenly crosses the road from right to left in front of the vehicle
vehicle brakes sharply to avoid hitting the crossing pedestrian

agents.ego_description: braking suddenly to avoid a pedestrian who crossed illegally in front of the vehicle

notable_agents.action: man in beige shirt and cap running across the road from right to left in front of the vehicle

entered.detail: multi-story concrete parking structure with open levels and illuminated interior
traffic signal control box mounted on a metal pole

segments.scene_description: A pedestrian suddenly emerges from the right and crosses directly in front of the vehicle, forcing an emergency brake. The multi-story parking garage becomes visible on the right as the vehicle slows to avoid collision with the crossing figure.

events.description: vehicle turns right and accelerates past the railroad crossing

agents.ego_description: turning right and accelerating along the street next to the parking garage

entered.detail: metal guardrail running along the right sidewalk
cross street visible ahead at the end of the parking garage

segments.scene_description: After the pedestrian clears the path, the vehicle turns right and accelerates past the railroad crossing, now driving alongside the concrete parking garage. The scene transitions to a narrower street section with the large parking structure dominating the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-soaked urban corridor that shifts from a steady approach toward a railroad crossing to a sudden stop and subsequent turn. It begins with the vehicle gliding down a multi-lane road lined with palm trees, where street lights cast a glow across the wet, reflective asphalt. As the car nears the X-shaped railroad warning signs, a pedestrian suddenly emerges from the right, forcing an emergency brake that brings the vehicle to a halt. Once the path clears, the camera pivots as the vehicle turns right and accelerates, leaving the crossing behind. The scene finally transitions into a narrower street where the massive concrete walls of a multi-story parking garage dominate the frame.
